and the same thing in ASCII:

--- /usr/ports/net/mpich-orig/pkg/PLIST Sun Apr 11 16:46:21 1999
+++ /usr/ports/net/mpich/pkg/PLIST      Sat Oct  9 07:16:43 1999
@@ -115,9 +115,11 @@
 mpich/build/freebsd/ch_p4/include/mpif.h

+mpich/build/freebsd/ch_p4/lib/libampi.a
